section_miscategorizations.text: He reports tenderness to palpation of the bilateral retinacular retinaculum and a positive patellar grind test.
section_miscategorizations.reason: Tenderness to palpation and a positive patellar grind test are physical exam findings observed by the clinician, not patient-reported symptoms.

MRI is an objective imaging result and belongs in Objective; its interpretive aspect in the Assessment is acceptable, but the pure statement that MRI supports the diagnosis is primarily an imaging finding.
